items.name: Plain Baguette
items.description: Our popular ‘signature’ bread. We are proud to make our baguettes in the old-fashioned and absolutely authentic way: just flour, natural yeast, sea salt, and water, allowing the dough a long fermentation period for maximum flavor. Baked fresh daily.

items.name: Sesame Seed Baguette

items.name: Mini Croissant
items.description: At PAUL, we believe that a croissant is at its fresh, delicious best for just four hours. This is why we prove and bake croissants regularly throughout the day so that they are always at their very best for you. Over a hundred years of experience from our family of French bakers have gone into creating the perfect Croissant – rich and tasty with a crisp crust and a deliciously soft center.

items.name: Chocolate Praline Yule Log Half(Serve 4)
items.description: this impressive centerpiece dessert features bavaroise cream made with 70% dark chocolate, crispy praline pieces, cocoa genoise, and almond dacquoise biscuit. Finished with a mirror chocolate glaze, it is decorated with dark chocolate curls and decorative dark chocolate end plaques. Up to 8 portions.

items.name: Chocolate Praline Yule Log  (Slice)
items.description: A slice for one of this delicate traditional Yule.

items.name: Caramel Pecan Yule Log ( Serves 8)
items.description: Madagascan vanilla Mousse, Madelien Biscuit, Pecans, Caramels, Chantilly Creme, Mascarpone, Vanilla Glaze, Mini Macarons, Dark Chocolate leaves

items.name: Caramel Pecan Yule Log ( half - Serves 4 )
items.description: Madagascan vanilla Mousse, Madelien Biscuit, Pecans, Caramels, Chantilly Creme, Mascarpone, Vanilla Glaze, Mini Macarons, Dark Chocolate leaves

items.name: Caramel Pecan Yule Log (  Slice )
items.description: A slice for one of this delicate traditional Yule.

items.name: Chocolate Buche Log Half (Serve 4)
items.description: Everyone loves the classic chocolate log, rich and indulgent, filled with 60% dark chocolate mousse and cocoa joconde biscuit, covered with chocolate buttercream, nibbed hazelnuts, a milk chocolate pine cone, and dark chocolate holly leaves. A lovely tea time treat or festive dessert for all the family.

items.name: Paul Collectors Charm Box
items.description: Quaint Paul Cottage with 4 collectible Porcelain charms inside. Share the joy of the Epiphnay with this limited edition collectible.

items.name: Lavazza Coffee Box
items.description: Share a gallon box of Lavazza coffee with your team. This box comes with cups, lids, sugars, diet sweeteners, stirrers & a (12oz) bottle of half & half.
